title: encode_base64 - Strange behavior
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_encode (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT TO_BASE64(data) FROM test_encode WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO test_encode (id, data) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT TO_BASE64(COALESCE(data, '')) FROM test_encode WHERE id = 2;
